name: velora
description: AI-powered fashion discovery and virtual try-on platform.

scripts.validate: npm run validate:backend && npm run validate:frontend && npm run validate:admin
scripts.validate:backend: npm --workspace backend run typecheck && npm --workspace backend run lint && npm --workspace backend run format:check
scripts.validate:frontend: npm --workspace frontend run typecheck && npm --workspace frontend run lint
scripts.validate:admin: npm --workspace admin run typecheck && npm --workspace admin run lint && npm --workspace admin run build
